name: Cartesia Sonic
tagline: Ultra-low latency real-time TTS with emotion and laughter
description: Cartesia's Sonic-3 is a streaming text-to-speech model that delivers sub-100ms latency with natural emotion, laughter, and expressive speech. It powers voice agents across healthcare, hospitality, and customer service with 40+ languages and instant voice cloning.
creator: Cartesia Inc
features: SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliant

name: Hume AI
tagline: Empathic voice AI that understands and expresses emotion
description: Hume AI is a research lab building voice AI models that can understand and express nuanced emotions. Their Octave TTS model generates speech with fine-grained emotional control, making interactions feel genuinely human and empathetic.
creator: Hume AI

name: Resemble AI
tagline: Secure voice AI with deepfake detection and watermarking
description: Resemble AI provides voice cloning, text-to-speech, and multimodal deepfake detection. Their Chatterbox Turbo model outperforms competitors in blind testing, while their Detect product achieves 96.7% accuracy across audio, image, and video deepfakes.
creator: Resemble AI

name: WellSaid Labs
tagline: Enterprise AI voice generator built with real voice actors
description: WellSaid Labs creates human-quality text-to-speech voices modeled on licensed recordings from real voice actors. Trusted by Microsoft, Motul, and other enterprise teams for training content, e-learning, and product narration with 120+ natural-sounding voices.
creator: WellSaid Labs

name: Play.ht
tagline: AI voice generator with ultra-realistic voices and podcast integration
description: Play.ht converts text to high-quality, professional-sounding audio with a wide selection of synthetic voices. It offers real-time TTS synthesis, podcast distribution to Spotify and iTunes, and WordPress integration for embedding audio on websites.
creator: Play.ht

name: Murf.AI
tagline: Versatile AI voiceover platform with pitch and tone control
description: Murf.AI provides 120+ natural-sounding voices in multiple languages with advanced pitch, speed, and tone editing. Its studio combines voiceover with video creation, background music, and presentation tools for a complete content production suite.
creator: Murf.AI
features: Team collaboration (3 users on free plan)

name: Listnr
tagline: AI voice generator with 900+ voices and podcast hosting
description: Listnr boasts one of the largest AI voice libraries with 900+ voices across 22 languages. It converts articles and blog posts to audio, offers podcast hosting with distribution to major platforms, and provides a TTS API for developers.
creator: Listnr Inc

name: LOVO (Genny)
tagline: AI voice and video platform for content creators
description: LOVO's Genny platform combines AI voice generation with video editing capabilities. It offers realistic voices for marketing, e-learning, and entertainment content, with features like voice cloning, emotional speech styles, and an integrated video editor.
creator: LOVO AI

name: Speechify
tagline: AI text-to-speech for reading and productivity
description: Speechify transforms text into natural-sounding audio for reading articles, documents, and books aloud. With celebrity voice options, speed control up to 4.5x, and cross-platform support, it's popular among students, professionals, and accessibility users.
creator: Speechify Inc

name: Synthesys
tagline: AI voice and video generation for professional content
description: Synthesys offers AI-powered voice and video generation with a focus on professional business content. It provides realistic AI avatars, multilingual voiceovers, and an all-in-one studio for creating marketing videos, training materials, and social media content.
creator: Synthesys

name: Darktrace
tagline: Self-learning AI cybersecurity platform for autonomous threat response
description: Darktrace uses self-learning AI to detect and respond to cyber threats across networks, email, cloud, and IoT in real time. Its ActiveAI platform autonomously contains threats without human intervention, protecting over 10,000 customers in 110 countries.
creator: Darktrace

name: SentinelOne Purple AI
tagline: AI security analyst that accelerates investigation and response
description: SentinelOne's Purple AI is a generative AI security analyst that helps teams investigate threats, automate response, and unify endpoint, cloud, and identity security. Named a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for 5 consecutive years.
creator: SentinelOne

name: Snyk Agent Security
tagline: AI-powered code security scanning and autonomous remediation
description: Snyk's Agent Security platform secures AI-generated code with automated vulnerability scanning, supply chain protection, and intelligent remediation. Their Agentic Architecture for Snyk Agent Fix provides faster, smarter security fixes across the development lifecycle.
creator: Snyk

name: Wiz
tagline: Cloud security platform with AI-powered risk assessment
description: Wiz provides comprehensive cloud security with AI-powered continuous risk assessment, integrating with Anthropic's Claude for autonomous vulnerability discovery. Their Red Agent and Green Agent capabilities enable machine-speed security across cloud, code, and AI infrastructure.
creator: Wiz
features: Red Agent with Claude Opus integration

name: CrowdStrike Falcon
tagline: AI-native cybersecurity platform with Charlotte AI assistant
description: CrowdStrike Falcon combines endpoint protection with Charlotte AI, a generative AI assistant that accelerates threat hunting, investigation, and response. Its unified platform covers endpoint, cloud identity, and SIEM with real-time threat intelligence.
creator: CrowdStrike

name: Keeper Security
tagline: AI-powered identity security for humans, machines, and AI agents
description: Keeper Security provides unified privileged access management with AI-powered threat detection. KeeperAI analyzes privileged activity in real time, automatically terminates high-risk sessions, and generates forensic-ready summaries across a zero-trust architecture.
creator: Keeper Security

name: Abnormal Security
tagline: AI-native email security that stops socially engineered attacks
description: Abnormal Security uses behavioral AI to detect and block sophisticated email attacks including BEC, vendor fraud, and account compromise. Its platform understands human behavior patterns to catch threats that traditional email security misses.
creator: Abnormal Security

name: Lacework
tagline: AI-driven cloud security with anomaly detection
description: Lacework uses AI and machine learning to provide cloud security posture management, workload protection, and anomaly detection. Its Polygraph Data Platform automatically baselines normal behavior and alerts on deviations across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes.
creator: Lacework

name: Veracode
tagline: AI-powered application security scanning and remediation
description: Veracode provides AI-enhanced static and dynamic application security testing with automated remediation guidance. Their AI Fix feature generates code patches for discovered vulnerabilities, significantly reducing the time from discovery to fix.
creator: Veracode

name: Pulumi Neo
tagline: AI for infrastructure code generation and management
description: Pulumi Neo brings AI-powered infrastructure-as-code to platform teams, enabling natural language infrastructure generation, debugging, and refactoring. Built on real programming languages like TypeScript, Python, and Go, it accelerates cloud infrastructure delivery.
creator: Pulumi
features: Multi-language support (TS, Python, Go, C#, Java)

name: Vercel AI Platform
tagline: Deploy and scale AI agents without DevOps
description: Vercel's AI Platform provides AI Gateway, Workflows, and Sandbox for building and deploying AI agents at scale. Their agentic infrastructure approach eliminates traditional DevOps overhead, with 100M+ workflow runs in beta and support for durable execution.
creator: Vercel
features: AI Gateway with zero data retention

name: Bito AI Architect
tagline: Knowledge graph context layer for autonomous coding agents
description: Bito AI Architect builds a knowledge graph from code, commits, docs, and issues to provide deep system context for coding agents. It lifts coding agent success by 35% on large codebases by grounding design, coding, and code review in the same contextual graph.
creator: Bito

name: n8n
tagline: AI-native workflow automation platform
description: n8n is an open-source workflow automation platform with deep AI integration, enabling teams to build complex automations with AI agents, LLM chains, and 400+ integrations. Its self-hostable architecture gives teams full control over their automation infrastructure.
creator: n8n GmbH

name: Depot
tagline: AI-accelerated container builds in the cloud
description: Depot provides cloud-native container build infrastructure that's up to 40x faster than local builds. It integrates with CI/CD pipelines to accelerate Docker builds, with persistent caching and intelligent layer management for development teams.
creator: Depot

name: Railway
tagline: Instant cloud deployment with zero DevOps overhead
description: Railway is a deployment platform that lets developers ship infrastructure without managing servers. With automatic scaling, built-in databases, and instant deployments from Git, it eliminates DevOps complexity for modern application teams.
creator: Railway

name: Gitpod
tagline: AI-ready cloud development environments
description: Gitpod provides instant, cloud-based development environments that spin up in seconds from any Git context. With AI-native workspace support and deep IDE integration, it standardizes development environments for teams building with AI coding agents.
creator: Gitpod

name: Coder
tagline: Self-hosted cloud development environments for enterprises
description: Coder enables enterprises to run cloud development environments on their own infrastructure, giving developers instant access to pre-configured workspaces. It supports AI coding agents, air-gapped deployments, and full security compliance for regulated industries.
creator: Coder

name: Earthly
tagline: AI-friendly CI/CD build framework that runs anywhere
description: Earthly is a CI/CD framework that combines Dockerfiles and Makefiles into a portable, repeatable build system. Its containerized approach ensures builds run identically locally and in CI, with AI-assisted build file generation and satellite remote build cache.
creator: Earthly Technologies
